Kabu-Kabu is a privacy-first P2P taxi and courier service.

 вАҐ Your exact GPS location is NEVER stored or transmitted.
 We only use a ~5 km fuzzy zone (GeoHash cell) for matching.

 вАҐ Your phone number is hashed (SHA-256) on this device.
 The plaintext number is never sent over any network.

 вАҐ All peer traffic is routed through the I2P anonymity network.
 No driver or courier can see your IP address.

 вАҐ All trip records are stored on your device only.
 No cloud database. No central server. No data broker.

 By accepting you agree to these privacy principles.
Enter your phone number. It will be hashed (SHA-256) immediately вАФ the plaintext is never stored or sent.
Could not broadcast вАФ check I2P connection
Still locating your zone, please waitвА¶
Running privately on I2P вАФ your location is not shared
